events.title: Faster, Stronger, Hungrier
events.scene: On the field you are simply better than everyone — faster off the line, harder in the tackle, the one the older boys pick first and resent for it. Coaches start to circle. For the {surname} line, raw physical gift is the seed of everything; the question is whether it is disciplined into greatness or burned on glory now.
events.researchNote: EX-3 athletic-locked youth beat: the prodigy whose body is the family's first capital.

choices.text: Submit to the hardest coach and drill until the gift becomes a machine
choices.outcome: You out-work everyone with talent and everyone with grit. The {surname} name becomes a byword for a champion forged, not born.

choices.text: Be the schoolyard legend now — win loud and worry about tomorrow later
choices.outcome: You become the name every kid in the district knows. The {surname} line learns early that the crowd's roar is its own kind of fuel.
